Video.summary: Ritchie received a video that appeared to be of his longtime girlfriend having sex with someone else; Jason's sister-in-law says he tried to seduce her.
Video.title: I Saw The Sex Tape, Why Are You Still Lying?

Image.alt: I Saw The Sex Tape, Why Are You Still Lying?
I Saw The Sex Tape, Why Are You Still Lying?
I Saw The Sex Tape, Why Are You Still Lying?

Video.summary: Our guests today have been wrapped around their lovers fingers and their finally ready to put a ring on it.
Video.title: Bridal Bombshells

Video.summary: Amanda's a workaholic mother losing her grasp on a 3rd marriage and in desperate need of help.Then Daniel's learning that all it takes to ruin an engagement is one bad night as his brief love affair with his fiancee's mother is back to haunt him!
Video.title: Mad Mom Meltdown

Video.summary: Angelica is unapologetic about sleeping with her twin's boyfriend; Makayla confronts the woman with whom her children's father hooked up; Stormy wants to take a shower with her friend Jessica.
Video.title: Steamy Sister Sex

Video.summary: Becca wants to rekindle her relationship with her ex, who has a pregnant new girlfriend; best friends Cory, Jess and Juan find themselves in a love triangle; siblings Keimo and Keke learn that their significant others have hooked up.
Video.title: You're Pregnant by Him, but It Should Be Me

Image.alt: You're Pregnant by Him, but It Should Be Me
You're Pregnant by Him, but It Should Be Me
You're Pregnant by Him, but It Should Be Me

Video.summary: SpringerCam joins Sam on a trucking trip where he professes his love and devotion for two women. Then Edward is here to confess to his wife that he's been having an affair with her sister! When the two sisters confront Edward, he's goin' home alone!
Video.title: I'm Leaving My Wife!

Video.summary: Athena is here to tell her fiancé that she is cheating, and that she poses nude on the Internet. Next Monica is cheating with her husband's best friend! Later Billy will admit to his girlfriend that he's been having an affair with her best friend.
Video.title: Sex Betrayals

Video.summary: Gail needs more excitement in her life so shes been sleeping with her boyfriend's best friend! Next Dave finds out that his girlfriend of 3 years is having an affair. He says he's willing to do anything to get her back; even wear her bra!
Video.title: Freaky Sex Stories

Video.summary: A transgender man has second thoughts about marrying a woman; Germaine wants his ex to take him back and reveals a secret; Stormie's husband gives her an ultimatum.
Video.title: Auditioning New Girlfriends

Video.summary: When John was sent away to prison, he asked brother Derrick to help take care of his family, but he never imagined Derrick would hook up with his baby mama! Then, John's tired of being Crystal's meal ticket and taking care of her family.
Video.title: Both Brothers Wanna Marry Me

Video.summary: Strippers Precious and Jewels have too much in common; John learns that his friend is responsible for the downturn in his marriage; DJ's girlfriend wants to see other people.
Video.title: She Took My Man ... and My Car!

Image.alt: She Took My Man ... and My Car!
She Took My Man ... and My Car!
She Took My Man ... and My Car!

Video.summary: Today's guests say that they are on a mission of sexual exploration. They are here to venture over to the other side and fulfill their wildest sex fantasies.
Video.title: Sex Fantasies Fulfilled

Video.summary: Arianna learns that her girlfriend has another on the side; Anthony says he made a mistake in cheating on his girlfriend, but the other woman will stop at nothing to be with him.
Video.title: In Your Face Mistresses

Video.summary: A woman discovers her man has been cheating with various women; a woman suspects her husband is cheating with their roommate.
Video.title: Jerry's Talk Show Host Special

Video.summary: Josh says his world was ruined once his girlfriend gave birth to their child, so he slept with her sister; Derrick wants to dump his boyfriend so that he can be single, free and able to do his own thing.
Video.title: Don't Settle for My Sister ... Pick Me

Image.alt: Don't Settle for My Sister ... Pick Me
Don't Settle for My Sister ... Pick Me
Don't Settle for My Sister ... Pick Me

Video.summary: Kenny, a former correctional officer, was sent to the same prison he worked at after stealing from his mom, writing bad checks in his dead grandfather’s name, and putting a knife to his mom’s throat. Will Kenny be able to turn his life around?
Video.title: My Son’s Going to Kill Me

Image.alt: My Son’s Going to Kill Me
My Son’s Going to Kill Me
My Son’s Going to Kill Me

Video.summary: George thinks his girlfriend is sleeping with her daughter's boyfriend; Adam says Tiffany has been trying for six years to trick him into confessing that he has been cheating on her.
Video.title: I Know She's Cheating With Her Daughter's Boyfriend

Image.alt: I Know She's Cheating With Her Daughter's Boyfriend
I Know She's Cheating With Her Daughter's Boyfriend
I Know She's Cheating With Her Daughter's Boyfriend

Video.summary: They say the "terrible teens" can be a trying time for parents. But 13 year old Kendra is really giving her parents a run for their money. Her father says that she's been caught smoking weed, having sex and even cutting herself.
Video.title: Drugs and Sex At 13?

Video.summary: Gina believes her grandson is being abused by her daughter's boyfriend Efrain. Her daughter wants to prove that he's innocent and is furious at her mom for accusing him. Was Gina right or is Efrain really innocent?
Video.title: How Could You Cover for Him?

Image.alt: How Could You Cover for Him?
How Could You Cover for Him?
How Could You Cover for Him?

Video.summary: Tina and her ex-boyfriend “G” split up after she revealed her pregnancy and he became abusive. She believes his ex Patrice is placing doubts in his head to keep them apart and “G” contends Tina is out to get him, but wants to be in the child’s life.
Video.title: A Pattern of Abuse?

Video.summary: Lianna and Devone have been married for a year, but she suspects Devone of being unfaithful because he stays out all night and is rarely home. Then, Kya is out on a $50,000 bond for allegedly abusing her newborn son, but did she do it?
Video.title: Is Our Life Together a Lie?

Image.alt: Is Our Life Together a Lie?
Is Our Life Together a Lie?
Is Our Life Together a Lie?

Video.summary: Brandie is a 16 year old sex addict who claims to have slept with over 200 men. Steve enlists the help of Marvelyn, a woman who contracted HIV at the age of 19. Then, Shantaysia is 19 years old and works as a prostitute.
Video.title: Teen Sex and Prostitution

Video.summary: Bill is 15 and huffs gasoline every day in order to get high and refused to stop, despite a loving family that wants to see him well.
Video.title: My Grandson is Killing Himself

Video.summary: Stephanie’s drug addiction led her to severely neglect and abuse their children. As Scott’s fiancée Amy has stepped in as a mother and Stephanie fails multiple drug tests, he doesn’t want her near the children, but wants her to atone for her wrongs!
Video.title: Mommy Hurt Me

Video.summary: Heather is 17 years old and she says her boyfriend Anthony is the father of her child. But Anthony thinks his brother, Tracy is the father. Then, Roxana believes her two-year-old nephew was beaten by his mother Kyesha.
Video.title: Did He Abuse My Son?

Video.summary: Marvin believes that Ieasha, with whom he had a fling, is trying to pin her toddler on him; married Savannah fears that her baby girl belongs to her ex-boyfriend; Alexis, furious that her ex would question the paternity of their son, wants revenge.
Video.title: I Can't Be The Father, She Was Already Pregnant

Image.alt: I Can't Be The Father, She Was Already Pregnant
I Can't Be The Father, She Was Already Pregnant
I Can't Be The Father, She Was Already Pregnant

Video.summary: A young child suffered serious life-threatening injuries, but not only is the mother Jessica considered a suspect, but her boyfriend Major and grandma Crystal are also under investigation! Find out the jaw dropping truth today!
Video.title: 3 Suspects Tested...Who Beat This Baby?

Video.summary: At seventeen, Dimitrius has already had three children and now four additional women claim to be pregnant with his baby. Then Ethel and her daughters need Steve's help to right their wrongs and get their family back on track.
Video.title: Steve's Had Enough

Video.summary: Thomazina’s boyfriend died a year ago and she thinks her daughter, Destiney slept with him! She also suspects Destiney tried to poison her with bleach! In December, Chris and Jesse’s baby died and they blame Jesse’s mother!
Video.title: My Daughter Tried to Poison Me

Image.alt: My Daughter Tried to Poison Me
My Daughter Tried to Poison Me
My Daughter Tried to Poison Me

Video.summary: A look at guests who are subjected to emotional abuse that chips away at their self-worth and independence.
Video.title: Relationships Exposed

Video.summary: Dustin wants a baby with his wife Tessa, but he thinks she is taking birth control because she's been cheating. Then, Anthony says that he's been physically abusive to his fiancee Marie, because he believes that she's been cheating on him.
Video.title: Steve I Don't Trust Her

Video.summary: Jannice fears telling her mother that she is a lesbian because she may get disowned.
Video.title: It's Finally Time To Tell My Mom I'm Gay

Image.alt: It's Finally Time To Tell My Mom I'm Gay
It's Finally Time To Tell My Mom I'm Gay
It's Finally Time To Tell My Mom I'm Gay

Video.summary: James uncovered a series of disturbing lies Shaneema told, and he now wonders if he is really her son's father; Lee wonders if his wife is still cheating on him.
Video.title: A Huge Lie Destroyed Us
